Version 9.16(1)
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 nameif outside
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 nameif inside
object network WEB01
 host 10.0.0.10
object-group network WEB-SERVERS
 network-object object WEB01
object service HTTPS
 service tcp destination eq 443
access-list outside_access_in extended permit tcp any object WEB01 eq 443 log
nat (inside,outside) source dynamic WEB-SERVERS interface
route outside 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 203.0.113.1 1
